title: 🔥流动性修复助推反弹
body: 宏观环境处于流动性修复期。BMRI 数值回升至 78，显著超越 4 月均值 61.32。虽然仍处于 RISK_OFF 状态，但金融条件的边际宽松支撑了 BTC 价格 7 日 2.3% 的涨幅。数据表明，当前反弹动力源于外部宏观预期改善，而非内部资金涌入。偏多。美联储转向是否在即？
body_en: The macro environment is currently in a liquidity repair phase. BMRI has rebounded to 78, significantly outpacing April's average of 61.32. While we remain in RISK_OFF mode, the marginal easing of financial conditions has underpinned BTC’s 7-day gain of 2.3%. Data indicates that current momentum stems from improved external macro expectations rather than internal capital inflows. Leaning bullish. Is the Fed pivot imminent?
